name: Collins Beach Suites
description: Oceanfront suites on Collins Ave with private balconies and morning yoga on the sand.

name: SoBe Art House
description: Pastel art-deco rooms steps from Lincoln Road shops, cafés, and ocean breezes.

name: Harborview Downtown
description: Floor-to-ceiling windows over Elliott Bay, walking distance to Pike Place Market.

name: Alpine Lodge
description: Timber-and-stone retreat with ski-in/ski-out access and a 24/7 cocoa bar.

name: Gramercy Loft
description: Industrial loft with exposed brick, a block from Gramercy Park.

name: Mission Courtyard
description: Sun-soaked courtyard hotel in the Mission with rooftop tacos and live music.

name: Lakeside Retreat
description: A-frame cabins on the water with kayaks at the dock and a fire pit under the stars.

name: Garden District
description: Wrought-iron balconies, magnolia courtyards, and beignets on the corner.

name: Le Marais Maison
description: Boutique hideaway tucked into a 17th-century townhouse in the Marais — exposed beams and a hidden courtyard.

name: Hôtel Saint-Germain
description: Left Bank elegance with velvet sofas, a tiny library bar, and croissants from the bakery downstairs.

name: Montmartre Atelier
description: A painter's loft a short climb from Sacré-Cœur, skylights pouring over the rooftops of Paris.

name: Tour Eiffel View Suites
description: Floor-to-ceiling Eiffel Tower views, marble baths, and a champagne welcome at check-in.

name: Canal Saint-Martin Loft
description: Industrial-chic loft by the canal, surrounded by coffee bars and weekend markets.

name: Covent Garden Townhouse
description: Georgian townhouse a minute from theatreland — afternoon tea served in the parlour at four.

name: Shoreditch Loft Hotel
description: Brick-and-steel loft rooms over an East London cocktail bar; vinyl in every suite.

name: Notting Hill Garden Rooms
description: Pastel facade, private walled garden, and the Portobello Market on your doorstep on Saturdays.

name: Thames View Riverside
description: Floor-to-ceiling views of the Thames and Tower Bridge, with a rooftop bar at golden hour.

name: Kensington Mews House
description: Charming mews house steps from Hyde Park — log fire in the snug, scones at breakfast.
